desc: Worked as a frontend developer building scalable web products and mobile application interfaces using React, Next.js, and React Native.

achievements.desc: Created and implemented Figma-based designs for e-commerce and ride-sharing platforms, supporting the full development lifecycle from planning to deployment.
Partnered with backend engineers to integrate APIs, build new functionalities, and deliver high-quality software solutions.
Collaborated with distributed teams to diagnose, track, and resolve issues, enhancing application reliability and overall user satisfaction.
Leveraged Git and GitHub for source control and team collaboration while working within Agile development processes and sprint-based workflows.

desc: I have successfully taught three batches of MERN & while teaching MERN to students it has helped me to strengthen my basics from core, also I learned to adapt new concepts quickly.
